resources.string: نیشاندان options that allow you to delete all files in a set of duplicates so that no file is left over.
Skip فایلs that are below the minimum size.
Only include common media فایلs, documents and archives.
Determine duplicates by calculating checksums for files. فایلs with matching checksums have the exact same content.
سڕینەوە all but one copy in all sets of duplicate files?
سڕینەوە all but one copy in this set of duplicate files?
سڕینەوە all files in this set of duplicate files? نەخێر file is left over!
سڕینەوە all but one copy in each selected set of duplicate files?
سڕینەوە all files in each selected set of duplicate files? نەخێر file is left over!
سڕینەوە all copies. نەخێر file is left over!
